summary: Stabilize permission sidebar drag sorting by limiting FLIP animation to the drop transition.

notes: No database schema or permission migration is included in this release.
Removed live FLIP reordering during drag-over to avoid transform conflicts with the browser drag system and React re-rendering.
Drag-over now only highlights the potential drop target.
The list order changes once on drop, with a single FLIP-style landing animation.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.48 and production VITE variables, sync frontend/dist, then rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.16.48.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.48 and the production VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against the deployed site.
